product.meta_description: Secure the Nendoroid Megurine Luka V4X from Character Vocal Series 03 by Good Smile Company at Hobby Genki. Features a microphone stand and rosé champagne.
product.meta_title: Nendoroid Megurine Luka V4X  Figure Limited Bonus Set
product.name: Nendoroid Megurine Luka V4X - Character Vocal Series 03: Megurine Luka Figure Limited Bonus Set
product.description:
Good Smile Company Nendoroid — Megurine Luka V4X (Character Vocal Series 03)

Celebrate an elegant milestone of digital vocal synthesis and sophisticated character architecture. Good Smile Company officially presents the stunning Nendoroid Megurine Luka V4X, scaling down her sleek and modernized virtual singer software design into the beloved handheld collector size. Masterfully sculpted by the technical artisans at toytec D.T.C under the strict production cooperation of Nendoron, this complete painted figure flawlessly embodies her mature charm and poetic poise.

This premium edition arrives equipped with three interchangeable face plates to capture her diverse artistic range. Collectors can seamlessly swap between a warm and bright cheerful face, a passionate and focused singing face perfect for mid-concert tracking, and an endearing mesmerized smiling face that highlights her softer, personal moments. Her signature long, flowing pink hair layout features subtle gradient paintwork, beautifully catching ambient room light to accentuate her dynamic structural movement.

To support high-fidelity performance staging on your shelf, the figure is packed with an array of carefully tailored accessory components. She comes complete with her classic metallic microphone and adjustable stand framework for grand vocal numbers, along with a sophisticated glass of rosé champagne to stage upscale, festive celebratory milestones. With a wide variety of interchangeable alternative hands and articulated joint segments, this figure allows you to tailor her composition to match your exact display preferences. Add this magnificent virtual diva to your dedicated lineup today!

Product Specifications:

  • Manufacturer: Good Smile Company
  • Production Cooperation: Nendoron
  • Sculptor: toytec D.T.C
  • Series Title: Character Vocal Series 03: Megurine Luka
  • JAN Code: 4570232587090
  • Classification: Nendoroid Non-Scale Painted Articulated Figure
  • Material Configuration: Premium Painted Plastic
  • Product Height: Approximately 100mm (10cm)

Hobby Genki Tip:
The Nendoroid Megurine Luka V4X figure is an essential milestone acquisition for Vocaloid completionists, introducing a refined wardrobe design and high-grade accessory options to your presentation shelf. To optimize your international logistics with ease, you can make full use of our Hobby Genki My Private Warehouse (MPW) service. You can lock in your unit safely today, hold your incoming items securely within your personal warehouse account space upon arrival, and easily bundle them later with scale figures, model kits, or trading cards to heavily reduce your combined global courier expenses!
product.description_short:
Bring the mature, soulful melodies of the virtual diva generation straight to your desktop display layout! Good Smile Company introduces the Nendoroid Megurine Luka V4X from the Character Vocal Series 03: Megurine Luka franchise. Capturing her upgraded, sleek software outfit design at the signature 100mm chibi scale, this premium articulated framework delivers exceptional custom poseability and sophisticated artisan charm.

  • Series: Character Vocal Series 03: Megurine Luka
  • Character: Megurine Luka (V4X Ver.)
  • JAN Code: 4570232587090
  • Line: Nendoroid
  • Manufacturer: Good Smile Company

Included Bonus: Champagne (White) parts

product.meta_description: Order the Cats are Liquid illustration by Karaage Toufu - Silver Moon figure by WE ART DOING at Hobby Genki! Features PU, real glass, and magnetic engineering.
product.name: Cats are Liquid Illustration by Karaage Toufu - Silver Moon Figure
product.description:
A Surreal, Elegant Take on the Ultimate Feline Phenomenon

It is a universally acknowledged truth that cats behave like liquid—and now, that playful internet running joke has been transformed into a breathtaking work of contemporary art! The "Cats are Liquid" Silver Moon Figure by WE ART DOING is a high-end designer art toy based on the brilliant, surreal illustrations of artist Karaage Toufu. Standing at a sophisticated 19.2 cm tall, this variant features the fluid feline drenched in an ethereal, moonlight-inspired silver palette. The sculptural design beautifully mimics the fluid property of liquid, freezing a single, impossibly graceful moment in time with a soft, radiant metallic luster that catches the light from every angle.

Premium Mixed-Media Composition with Ingenious Magnetic Engineering

WE ART DOING is renowned for pushing the boundaries of traditional figure manufacturing, and this stunning release showcases their mastery of materials. Moving away from standard PVC, this collectible art piece is crafted from high-grade Polyurethane (PU) to achieve an ultra-smooth, high-gloss surface that elevates the rich silver and pearlescent gradients. The set includes a genuine glass wine glass as an essential display prop, utilizing hidden internal magnets that allow the fluid cat to drape elegantly and securely around the glass and its custom base. The result is a striking, gravity-defying composition that serves as an incredible conversation piece.

【 Product Specifications & Set Contents 】

  • Figure Line: Premium Designer Art Toy Series
  • Total Height: Approx. 19.2 cm (including base)
  • Material Composition: High-Quality PU (Polyurethane), Magnet, Genuine Glass
  • Set Contents:
    • Main Liquid Cat Figure (Silver Moon Ver.)
    • Authentic Wine Glass Prop
    • Dedicated Display Base

Hobby Genki Tips: High-end designer art toys from WE ART DOING are produced in strictly limited, one-time production runs, making them highly sought after by collectors worldwide! Because this premium piece features delicate real glass and magnetic components, it will be packaged with extreme care in a specialized foam-padded box. Secure your pre-order today to guarantee this masterpiece for your collection, and take advantage of our free My Private Warehouse service to hold it safely upon release and combine it with other figures or Nendoroids to massively cut down on international shipping costs.
product.description_short:
Experience a sophisticated take on the internet's favorite feline meme with the "Cats are Liquid" Silver Moon Figure by WE ART DOING! Based on Karaage Toufu's elegant illustration, this premium designer art toy captures a sleek cat gracefully spilling like fluid, reimagined in an ethereal, luminous silver colorway. Crafted using high-quality PU, hidden magnets, and a real glass wine glass, this unique mixed-media piece perfectly blends surreal fine art with contemporary pop culture.

  • Theme: Cats are Liquid / Designer Art Toy
  • Variant: Silver Moon
  • Maker: WE ART DOING
  • Materials: Premium PU, Magnet, Glass

product.meta_description: Secure the complete Pokémon Scale World Sinnoh Region 3 Set by Bandai Candy. Features 1/20 scale figures of Cyrus, Darkrai, Shaymin (Sky Forme), and more.
product.meta_title: Pokémon Scale World Sinnoh Region 3 Set | Hobby Genki
product.name: Pokemon Scale World Sinnoh Region 3 Set
product.description:
Bandai Candy Toy Pokémon Scale World — Sinnoh Region Volume 3 Complete Box Set

Recreate the vast ecological diversity of the Sinnoh region right on your collector shelf with flawless proportions. Bandai Candy Toy officially expands its highly celebrated uniform-scale lineage with the Pokémon Scale World Sinnoh Region 3 Set. Built around the core concept of a shared universe where humans and Pokémon stand side-by-side, every single asset in this premium box collection is mapped strictly to an authentic 1/20 physical scale framework, letting you visualize the exact size discrepancies between various species as depicted in the games and anime.

This third wave focuses heavily on the dramatic milestones of the Pokémon Diamond and Pearl storyline. The highlight of the human roster is none other than Cyrus, the cold and calculating supreme boss of Team Galactic, sculpted with immaculate screen accuracy. Standing alongside the villainous mastermind are powerful and elusive Sinnoh region legends, including the terrifying phantom of nightmares, Darkrai, and the graceful, high-flying Shaymin (Sky Forme). The structural lineup is engineered to display the spectacular contrast between fingertips-sized creatures and massive palm-filling pocket monsters.

This premium box configuration is a complete factory-sealed set containing all 11 character types in a single delivery framework. Collectors are guaranteed to secure the full assortment of 10 Pokémon species and 1 Trainer figure without dealing with the frustration of random blind-box duplicates. Each model arrives factory pre-painted with exceptional color fidelity, mapping out pristine matte finishes and sharp textural layers. Expand your scale world display and construct the ultimate Sinnoh diorama configuration today!

Set Composition & Lineup Details:

  • 1x Cyrus (Team Galactic Boss Trainer Figure)
  • 1x Darkrai (Mythical Pokémon Layer)
  • 1x Shaymin - Sky Forme (Mythical Pokémon Layer)
  • 8x Additional Sinnoh Region Pokémon Species (Completing the 11-Type Set)
  • Dedicated translucent structural support stands assortment

Product Specifications:

  • Manufacturer: Bandai Candy Toy
  • Series Title: Pokémon Scale World (Sinnoh Region Part 3)
  • JAN Code: 4570117928949
  • Classification: 1/20 Scale Shokugan Pre-Painted Figure Complete Set
  • Material Base: High-Quality Painted PVC, ABS Plastic
  • Scale Proportion: Strictly 1/20 Uniform Scale Layout
  • Packaging Feature: Full collector box containing 11 pieces total

Hobby Genki Tip:
The Pokémon Scale World Sinnoh 3 Box Set is an absolute must-have milestone asset for Pokémon enthusiasts and diorama builders, providing a massive layout of 1/20 uniform figures in a single purchase framework. Because candy toy sets pack substantial volumetric data across multiple smaller boxes, we highly recommend utilizing our Hobby Genki My Private Warehouse (MPW) service. You can lock in your secure order today, store your items safely within your personal warehouse account space upon arrival, and easily bundle them later with scale figures, Nendoroids, or trading card boxes to heavily optimize your total international logistics costs!
product.description_short:
Step into a meticulously layouted world where humans and pocket monsters coexist in perfect proportion! Bandai Candy Toy delivers the complete Pokémon Scale World Sinnoh Region 3 Set, bringing the legendary setting of Pokémon Diamond and Pearl to life. This massive premium box collection gathers an array of Sinnoh creatures alongside their iconic human counterpart, all built to a mathematically precise 1/20 scale model standard.

  • Series: Pokémon Scale World (Sinnoh Region)
  • Scale Framework: 1/20 Uniform Scale Blueprint
  • JAN Code: 4570117928949
  • Set Volume: 11 Figures Total (10 Pokémon + 1 Trainer)
  • Manufacturer: Bandai Candy Toy
